expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families (e.g. Space Grotesk, DM Sans), not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD names Instrument Serif, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono as specific font families

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 3 font families: Instrument Serif (headings), Satoshi (body), and JetBrains Mono (tags/metadata). Even though mono is a specialized accent, the assertion strictly says 'at most 2 font families' and 3 are named

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8 (or 4 for icon padding)
expectations.evidence: Spacing scale includes 160px (multiple of 8, OK) but also uses 12px in capability grid crossAxisSpacing and 10px in tag pill padding ('4px 10px'). 10px is not a multiple of 8 or 4-for-icon-padding

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands (forge insert, forge style, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Build plan contains 133 forge commands including forge insert frame, forge insert text, forge style, forge insert stack, forge move, forge set-layout

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot commands after major sections
expectations.evidence: Phase 7 includes forge screenshot commands for full page and each section: qa-nav.png, qa-hero.png, qa-work.png, qa-about.png, qa-approach.png, qa-contact.png

expectations.text: Colors and fonts in forge commands match the DDD values
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses #0A0A0A (bg), #111111 (surface), #EDEDED (text), #888888 (secondary), #C8FF00 (accent), Instrument Serif, Satoshi, JetBrains Mono — all matching DDD
